requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — DOSM IEC-based MS Standards (230 V / 50 Hz grid)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — DOSM基于IEC的MS标准（230 V / 50 Hz电网）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — DOSM基於IEC的MS標準（230 V / 50 Hz電網）

summary.en: Laos operates a 230 V, 50 Hz national grid, administered by EDL (Electricite du Laos). DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) adopts IEC-based Lao national standards (MS standards) for electrical equipment safety. For information technology and communications equipment, the relevant IEC base standard is IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements). DOSM MS standards are issued as Lao national standards and may be mandatory or voluntary depending on product category and regulatory order. Mandatory application is determined by MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) and DOSM regulatory instruments. EDL sets grid-interface technical requirements for equipment connected to the EDL network. The nominal voltage difference between Laos (230 V) and China (220 V) means that equipment rated for 220 V only may not comply with Lao grid nominal voltage; equipment should be rated 220-240 V or 230 V to ensure compatibility.
summary.zh: 老挝国家电网由EDL（老挝电力公司）负责管理，电压为230 V、频率为50 Hz。DOSM（标准计量局）采用基于IEC的老挝国家标准（MS标准）规范电气设备安全。对于信息技术和通信设备，相关IEC基础标准为IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——第1部分：安全要求）。DOSM MS标准作为老挝国家标准发布，根据产品类别和监管令，可为强制性或自愿性标准。强制执行由能源矿产部（MEM）和DOSM监管文件确定。EDL为接入EDL网络的设备设定电网接口技术要求。老挝（230 V）与中国（220 V）的额定电压差异意味着仅额定220 V的设备可能不符合老挝电网额定电压；设备应额定220-240 V或230 V以确保兼容性。
summary.zht: 寮國國家電網由EDL（寮國電力公司）負責管理，電壓為230 V、頻率為50 Hz。DOSM（標準計量局）採用基於IEC的寮國國家標準（MS標準）規範電氣設備安全。對於信息技術和通訊設備，相關IEC基礎標準為IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息和通訊技術設備——第1部分：安全要求）。DOSM MS標準作為寮國國家標準發布，根據產品類別和監管令，可為強制性或自願性標準。強制執行由能源礦產部（MEM）和DOSM監管文件確定。EDL為接入EDL網絡的設備設定電網接口技術要求。寮國（230 V）與中國（220 V）的額定電壓差異意味著僅額定220 V的設備可能不符合寮國電網額定電壓；設備應額定220-240 V或230 V以確保相容性。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR DOSM MS standards (IEC-based) — electrical safety for information technology and communications equipment
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment; Part 1: Safety requirements (IEC base standard adopted by DOSM)
EDL grid-interface technical requirements — for equipment connected to the EDL 230 V / 50 Hz network
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) regulatory instruments — determine mandatory application of DOSM MS standards

summary.en: In China, information technology equipment safety is governed by GB 4943.1-2022 (Information technology equipment — Safety — Part 1: General requirements), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018 (second edition). Compliance with GB 4943.1-2022 is mandatory for CCC-listed IT equipment under CNCA-C17-01, enforced by SAMR. China's grid is 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz frequency as Laos but a lower nominal voltage (220 V vs. 230 V Lao nominal). Products certified only for 220 V may require re-rating or re-testing for the Lao 230 V nominal grid.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术设备安全由GB 4943.1-2022（信息技术设备——安全——第1部分：通用要求）规范，技术上等同于IEC 62368-1:2018（第二版）。GB 4943.1-2022合规对须进行CCC认证的信息技术设备（依据CNCA-C17-01，由市场监管总局执行）为强制要求。中国电网为220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），50 Hz——与老挝频率相同（50 Hz），但额定电压较低（220 V对比老挝230 V）。仅额定220 V认证的产品可能需要重新额定或重新检测以满足老挝230 V额定电网要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術設備安全由GB 4943.1-2022（信息技術設備——安全——第1部分：通用要求）規範，技術上等同於IEC 62368-1:2018（第二版）。GB 4943.1-2022合規對須進行CCC認證的信息技術設備（依據CNCA-C17-01，由市場監管總局執行）為強制要求。中國電網為220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），50 Hz——與寮國頻率相同（50 Hz），但額定電壓較低（220 V對比寮國230 V）。僅額定220 V認證的產品可能需要重新額定或重新檢測以滿足寮國230 V額定電網要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Information technology equipment; safety; Part 1: General requirements (equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018 2nd edition) (SAMR/CNCA, mandatory under CCC for IT equipment)

gap.en: The key gaps are: (1) Voltage rating — Laos nominal grid is 230 V; China is 220 V. Equipment rated 220 V only may not be suitable for the Lao grid without re-rating or re-testing. Equipment rated 220-240 V is generally compatible. (2) Standard version — DOSM adopts IEC-based MS standards; the applicable IEC version should be verified with DOSM as it may differ from GB 4943.1-2022 (IEC 62368-1 2nd edition). (3) Mandatory vs. voluntary status — mandatory application of specific DOSM MS standards for wireless/IoT devices should be confirmed with MEM/DOSM as the regulatory instrument may not be publicly accessible. (4) Chinese CCC test reports to GB 4943.1-2022 may be accepted as supporting evidence by DOSM but this should be verified; they do not automatically satisfy Lao requirements.
gap.zh: 主要差距包括：（1）额定电压——老挝电网额定电压为230 V，中国为220 V。仅额定220 V的设备在未经重新额定或重新检测的情况下可能不适用于老挝电网。额定220-240 V的设备通常兼容。（2）标准版本——DOSM采用基于IEC的MS标准；适用IEC版本应与DOSM核实，可能与GB 4943.1-2022（IEC 62368-1第二版）存在差异。（3）强制性与自愿性——无线/物联网设备适用特定DOSM MS标准的强制性应与MEM/DOSM确认，相关监管文件可能无法公开获取。（4）中国GB 4943.1-2022 CCC检测报告可能被DOSM作为佐证材料接受，但须核实；不自动满足老挝要求。
gap.zht: 主要差距包括：（1）額定電壓——寮國電網額定電壓為230 V，中國為220 V。僅額定220 V的設備在未經重新額定或重新檢測的情況下可能不適用於寮國電網。額定220-240 V的設備通常相容。（2）標準版本——DOSM採用基於IEC的MS標準；適用IEC版本應與DOSM核實，可能與GB 4943.1-2022（IEC 62368-1第二版）存在差異。（3）強制性與自願性——無線/物聯網設備適用特定DOSM MS標準的強制性應與MEM/DOSM確認，相關監管文件可能無法公開獲取。（4）中國GB 4943.1-2022 CCC檢測報告可能被DOSM作為佐證材料接受，但須核實；不自動滿足寮國要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory application of DOSM MS electrical safety standards depends on MEM/DOSM regulatory instruments for specific product categories — confirm with DOSM; 230 V / 50 Hz voltage rating compatibility is a hard product requirement for the Lao market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed IT equipment — GB 4943.1-2022 under CNCA-C17-01 (SAMR); grid voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Ministry of Science and Technology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos operates a 230 V / 50 Hz grid; wireless/IoT devices must be rated for 230 V (or 220-240 V range) to be compatible. DOSM IEC-based MS standards govern electrical safety; mandatory status for specific wireless/IoT categories should be confirmed with MEM/DOSM. Chinese CCC test reports (GB 4943.1-2022) may support but do not automatically satisfy Lao requirements. Verified: false — confirm current DOSM/MEM requirements before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝电网为230 V / 50 Hz；无线/物联网设备必须额定230 V（或220-240 V范围）以确保兼容。DOSM基于IEC的MS标准规范电气安全；特定无线/物联网类别的强制性应与MEM/DOSM确认。中国CCC检测报告（GB 4943.1-2022）可作为佐证但不自动满足老挝要求。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认DOSM/MEM当前要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國電網為230 V / 50 Hz；無線/物聯網設備必須額定230 V（或220-240 V範圍）以確保相容。DOSM基於IEC的MS標準規範電氣安全；特定無線/物聯網類別的強制性應與MEM/DOSM確認。中國CCC檢測報告（GB 4943.1-2022）可作為佐證但不自動滿足寮國要求。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認DOSM/MEM當前要求。
